title: C-Side of YTPMV
description:
EDIT#4 30/05/2015:
Thank you Nebulon Ranger, this is pretty good  8D
http://nebulonranger.org/2015/05/30/c-side-of-ytpmv-remastered-edition/

EDIT#3 01/10/2014:
Seems like Italians have managed to do what I haven't  =P
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jD7YskGDZUk

EDIT#2 08/07/2013:
Now this is what I'd call a good example of what I'd like to see more: 
http://soundcloud.com/philscheberg/c-side-of-ytpmv-more-retro

And by that, I mean remixes of medleys  =D

EDIT 16/05/2013:
As a really late thank you for 1000 subs, I'll present to you... The .FLP file  のワの
https://www.dropbox.com/s/jn5q09wo4p1j23j/
https://www.mediafire.com/file/oriw93gc82byhkw/

***

Ladies and gentlemen, I present to you... Seven Asses  のワの

After almost a YEAR of working on this, it's finally finished: the third Medley of YTPMV, from the guy who made the remakes of the previous two. Enjoy!  =D

#ytpmvmedley
